title: Opcode sequence lookup
description: Find similar matched and unmatched functions by live opcode-sequence indexes generated from build/GC6E01/asm, with report-based function-shape rows retained as supplemental lookup evidence.
status_message: Live runner v1: opcode fingerprints are generated locally from build/GC6E01/asm by toolpacks/gamecube-decomp/research/opseq/runners/extract_opcode_sequences.py.
limitations: Opcode fingerprints come from generated assembly artifacts; rerun the runner after rebuilding asm/report outputs.
Similarity search is lexical over indexed opcode fingerprints and metadata, not a full edit-distance engine.

usage.agent_guidance: Use before inventing a source shape when similar opcode or function-shape evidence could point to a local analog.
